title: Reliance Footprint is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Footprint is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Footprint! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Footprint:
Reliance Footprint is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Footprint!
